import subprocess

    ['python', '/a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira.py', '--filter-id', '13811', '--view-id', '10489904'],
    capture_output=True,
    text=True
)
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr:
    print('STDERR:', result.stderr)
print('Return code:', result.returncode)
